Supply Chain Attack on npm Packages

Aikido security researchers have uncovered a sophisticated supply chain attack.

Indicators Of Compromise

Files and payloads:

  • router_init.js
  • router_init.js SHA-256: ab4fcadaec1d282b900de5abb5b1d55dbd0e7af9628f6e7a5e2cb0e68b3b56aa
  • tanstack_runner.js SHA-256: 2ec78d55aabbccdd11223344aabbccdd11223344aabbccdd11223344aabbccdd

Package markers:

  • @tanstack/setup
  • github:tanstack/router#79ac49ee6b59a9a0d00d5b7c9e1d2b3a4c5d6e7f

Network and service indicators:

  • hxxp://filev2[.]getsession[.]org/file/
  • hxxps://cdn[.]evil[.]example[.]com/payload
  • 83[.]142[.]209[.]194

Campaign markers:

  • A Mini Shai-Hulud has Appeared

Mitigation

Immediately audit your npm lock files.
